title: Causa Sui
description: Summon reality from the void or overworld
body:
🚧 Currently in Beta 🚧 This pack is fully playable but still being refined. Expect balance tweaks and minor changes. Your feedback will help shape the 1.0.0.0 stable release! # Causa Sui: A Mage's Genesis Your journey to ultimate power begins with mastering the vibrant art of **Botania**. This is your foundation for skyblock starts, but optional for overworld adventurers. Once you've conquered nature's secrets, forge your own path through the higher arts: - **Natural Magic** (Botania) - *Mandatory for skyblock, optional for overworld* - **Programmable Magic** (Ars Nouveau) - **Runic Coding** (Hex Casting) - **Blood Rituals** (Blood Magic) - **Spirit Binding** (Occultism) - **Traditional Witchcraft** (Enchanted) - **Mechanical Engineering** (Create) - **Industrial Logistics** (EnderIO) *Skyblock is the default world type. Change it during creation for a regular world.*

Credits

  • Aquaculture 2 [2.5.5] by Shadowclaimer, Girafi
  • Ars Nouveau - Extended Glyphs [1.20.1-1.9] by 1nsider
